orchestrator.description: Breaks PLAN.md phases into TASKS.md items, assigns each to the right specialist, sequences dependencies, merges once the reviewer approves. This is the agent you talk to directly.

backend.description: Everything in backend/ — migrations, models, services, controllers, jobs. Invoke for any Laravel-side implementation task.

frontend.description: Everything in frontend/ — components, pages, i18n wiring. Invoke for any Next.js-side implementation task.

database.description: Migration correctness, indexes, and query performance review. Invoke before merging any migration-touching PR.

reviewer.description: Approves or rejects every PR against TESTS.md's Definition of Done before it merges. Invoke on every completed task, no exceptions.

security.description: Stricter secondary review for anything touching payments, auth, or webhooks specifically, against SECURITY.md. Invoke in addition to reviewer for Phase 3 and any auth-related task.

docs-tests.description: Writes the tests specified in TESTS.md's priority list, keeps DATA_MODEL.md/API_SPEC.md in sync if an approved PR legitimately needed to deviate from them. Invoke alongside backend/frontend work.

devops.description: infra/, CI workflows, environment configuration. Invoke for Phase 0 setup and any docker-compose/CI change.
